**Step B — 第 335~336 行（chip report `{% endif %}` 後、族群地圖前），插入 memo 區塊：**

```html
<section class="section-block memo-board-section" id="memo-board">
  <header class="section-head">
    <div>
      <h2 class="section-title">個股 Memo 公佈欄</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">個人研究筆記 · 按日期倒序 · 支援股號／名稱／關鍵字搜尋</p>
    </div>
    <div class="memo-right-actions">
      <div class="memo-search-wrap">
        <svg class="search-icon" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/>
        </svg>
        <input type="text" id="memo-search"
               placeholder="搜尋股號、名稱或關鍵字…" autocomplete="off">
      </div>
      <a href="memo-admin.html" class="memo-admin-link">+ 管理</a>
    </div>
  </header>
  <div id="memo-board-list" class="memo-board-list"></div>
  <p id="memo-empty-msg" class="memo-empty-msg" hidden>尚無 memo 資料。<a href="memo-admin.html">前往新增</a></p>
</section>

<script>
(function () {
  // ── 資料：localStorage 優先，fallback 為 build 注入的 MEMO_DATA ──
  var FALLBACK = {{ memo_data | tojson }};
  var ALL = [];

  function loadData() {
    try {
      var stored = localStorage.getItem('memo_board_data');
      var local = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
      ALL = (local && local.length) ? local : (FALLBACK || []);
    } catch (e) {
      ALL = FALLBACK || [];
    }
    ALL.forEach(function (m) {
      m._k = [m.stock_id, m.stock_name, (m.tags||[]).join(' '), m.title||'', m.content||''].join(' ').toLowerCase();
    });
    // 確保倒序
    ALL.sort(function (a, b) { return (b.date||'').localeCompare(a.date||''); });
  }

  var list = document.getElementById('memo-board-list');
  var input = document.getElementById('memo-search');
  var emptyMsg = document.getElementById('memo-empty-msg');
  if (!list || !input) return;

  function esc(s) {
    return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
  }

  function render(memos) {
    if (!memos.length) { list.innerHTML = ''; emptyMsg.hidden = false; return; }
    emptyMsg.hidden = true;
    var groups = {}, order = [];
    memos.forEach(function (m) {
      var d = m.date || '未標日期';
      if (!groups[d]) { groups[d] = []; order.push(d); }
      groups[d].push(m);
    });
    var html = [];
    order.forEach(function (d) {
      html.push('<div class="memo-date-group"><div class="memo-date-label">' + esc(d) + '</div><div class="memo-cards">');
      groups[d].forEach(function (m, i) {
        var id = 'mc-' + d.replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + i;
        var href = 'company/' + esc(m.stock_id) + '.html';
        html.push(
          '<div class="memo-card" id="' + id + '">' +
            '<div class="memo-card-header">' +
              '<div class="memo-card-stock">' +
                '<a href="' + href + '" class="memo-stock-id">' + esc(m.stock_id) + '</a>' +
                '<span class="memo-stock-name">' + esc(m.stock_name) + '</span>' +
              '</div>' +
              '<button class="memo-toggle-btn" data-body="' + id + '-body" aria-expanded="false">' +
                '<span>展開</span>' +
                '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>' +
              '</button>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div class="memo-card-title">' + esc(m.title) + '</div>' +
            (m.tags && m.tags.length ? '<div class="memo-tags">' + m.tags.map(function(t){return '<span class="memo-tag">'+esc(t)+'</span>';}).join('') + '</div>' : '') +
            '<div class="memo-card-body" id="' + id + '-body" hidden>' +
              '<p class="memo-content">' + esc(m.content).replace(/\n/g,'<br>') + '</p>' +
            '</div>' +
          '</div>'
        );
      });
      html.push('</div></div>');
    });
    list.innerHTML = html.join('');
  }

  list.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var btn = e.target.closest('.memo-toggle-btn');
    if (!btn) return;
    var body = document.getElementById(btn.getAttribute('data-body'));
    if (!body) return;
    var open = btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
    body.hidden = open;
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!open));
    btn.querySelector('span').textContent = open ? '展開' : '收合';
    btn.classList.toggle('is-open', !open);
  });

  var debounce;
  input.addEventListener('input', function () {
    clearTimeout(debounce);
    debounce = setTimeout(function () {
      var q = input.value.toLowerCase().trim();
      if (!q) { render(ALL); return; }
      var tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      render(ALL.filter(function (m) { return tokens.every(function (t) { return m._k.includes(t); }); }));
    }, 100);
  });

  loadData();
  render(ALL);
})();
</script>
```

**Step C — 第 442 行後（search-data.js 之後）：** 無需額外 script 標籤（inline 即可）

### 4. `site/static/style.css`（末尾新增）

```css
/* ── 個股 Memo 公佈欄 ── */
.memo-board-section .section-head { flex-wrap: nowrap; align-items: center; }
.memo-right-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.memo-search-wrap { position: relative; width: 240px; }
.memo-search-wrap .search-icon { position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-mute); pointer-events: none; }
.memo-search-wrap input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px 8px 34px; background: var(--bg-elev); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text); font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; }
.memo-search-wrap input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }
.memo-admin-link { padding: 7px 14px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s; }
.memo-admin-link:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); color: #fff; }
.memo-board-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 28px; }
.memo-date-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.memo-date-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--accent-dark); padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }
.memo-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
.memo-card { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: var(--shadow); transition: box-shadow 0.15s, transform 0.15s; }
.memo-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.memo-card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 12px 14px 6px; gap: 8px; }
.memo-card-stock { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 7px; min-width: 0; }
.memo-stock-id { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; }
.memo-stock-id:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.memo-stock-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.memo-toggle-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); border-radius: 20px; background: var(--bg-elev); color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; }
.memo-toggle-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-soft); }
.memo-toggle-btn svg { transition: transform 0.2s; }
.memo-toggle-btn.is-open svg { transform: rotate(180deg); }
.memo-card-title { padding: 0 14px 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; }
.memo-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; padding: 0 14px 10px; }
.memo-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--accent-3-soft); color: var(--accent-3); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; }
.memo-card-body { padding: 10px 14px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft); background: var(--bg-elev); }
.memo-content { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--text-soft); }
.memo-empty-msg { text-align: center; padding: 32px; color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 15px; }
@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .memo-board-section .section-head { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .memo-right-actions { width: 100%; }
  .memo-search-wrap { width: 100%; flex: 1; }
  .memo-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
/* ── Memo 管理頁（memo-admin.html 專用） ── */
.admin-wrap { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 20px; }
.admin-form-card { background: var(--bg-elev); border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
.admin-form-card h2 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.admin-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.admin-field label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-soft); }
.admin-field input, .admin-field textarea { padding: 9px 12px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--text); font-size: 14px; outline: none; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.admin-field input:focus, .admin-field textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }
.admin-field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 120px; }
.admin-btn-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.admin-btn { padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.15s; }
.admin-btn.primary { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
.admin-btn.primary:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); }
.admin-btn.secondary { background: var(--bg-elev-2); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.admin-btn.secondary:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
.admin-btn.danger { background: #fee2e2; color: var(--red); border: 1px solid #fca5a5; }
.admin-btn.danger:hover { background: var(--red); color: #fff; }
.admin-memo-item { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.admin-memo-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; }
.admin-memo-meta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-mute); }
.admin-memo-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); margin: 4px 0; }
.admin-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; background: var(--text); color: var(--bg); padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; z-index: 9999; transition: opacity 0.3s; }
```

### 5. 新建 `site/dist/memo-admin.html`（後台控制台完整頁面）

功能：
- **新增表單**（日期預設今天、股票代號、股名、標題、內容、標籤）
- **已存 memo 列表**（可刪除，倒序顯示）
- **匯入 JSON**（讀取 memos.json 合併進 localStorage，以 `date+stock_id+title` 去重）
- **匯出 JSON**（下載 localStorage 全部 memo 為 memos.json）
- **Toast 提示**（新增/刪除/匯入/匯出 成功訊息）

---

## 實作順序

1. `site/build_site.py`：常數 → load_memos() → render_all 傳參（共 3 處）
2. `site/templates/index.html`：nav 連結 → memo section（含 inline JS） 
3. `site/static/style.css`：末尾新增 CSS
4. `site/dist/memo-admin.html`：全新建立
5. 執行 `python site/build_site.py --skip-finlab` 驗證
6. 開啟 `site/dist/index.html` 確認公佈欄顯示（初始空的）
7. 開啟 `site/dist/memo-admin.html` 輸入使用者範例兩筆，確認首頁即時顯示

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Memo 管理 · 族群寶</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="static/logo.png">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="static/style.css">
</head>
<body>

<header class="site-header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="logo">
      <img class="logo-mark" src="static/logo.png" alt="族群寶">
      <span class="logo-text">
        <strong>族群寶</strong>
        <em>Memo 管理</em>
      </span>
    </a>
    <nav class="primary-nav">
      <a href="index.html" class="">← 返回首頁</a>
      <a href="index.html#memo-board" class="">公佈欄</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<main class="site-main">
<div class="admin-wrap">

  <!-- 新增表單 -->
  <div class="admin-form-card">
    <h2 class="admin-section-title">新增 Memo</h2>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label for="f-date">日期</label>
        <input type="date" id="f-date">
      </div>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label for="f-stock-id">股票代號</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-stock-id" placeholder="例：6510">
      </div>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label for="f-stock-name">股名</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-stock-name" placeholder="例：精測">
      </div>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label for="f-tags">標籤（逗號分隔，可留空）</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-tags" placeholder="例：TPU, 探針卡, 法說">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-field">
      <label for="f-title">標題摘要</label>
      <input type="text" id="f-title" placeholder="例：法說：TPU 帶動探針卡需求，長線仍可追蹤">
    </div>
    <div class="admin-field">
      <label for="f-content">內容</label>
      <textarea id="f-content" placeholder="詳細備忘內容…"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-btn-row">
      <button class="admin-btn primary" id="btn-add">新增 Memo</button>
      <button class="admin-btn secondary" id="btn-clear-form">清空表單</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 匯入 / 匯出 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:28px;">
    <h2 class="admin-section-title">資料備份</h2>
    <div class="admin-io-row">
      <button class="admin-btn secondary" id="btn-export">匯出 memos.json</button>
      <label class="admin-btn secondary" style="cursor:pointer;margin:0;">
        匯入 memos.json
        <input type="file" id="file-import" accept=".json" style="display:none;">
      </label>
      <span id="io-hint" style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-mute);">匯出後儲存至 site/memos.json 作為備份</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 已存 memo 列表 -->
  <div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
      <h2 class="admin-section-title" style="margin:0;">已存 Memo <span id="memo-count" style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-mute);"></span></h2>
      <button class="admin-btn danger-sm" id="btn-clear-all" style="font-size:12px;">清空全部</button>
    </div>
    <div id="admin-memo-list"></div>
  </div>

</div>
</main>

<div class="admin-toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
(function () {
  var STORAGE_KEY = 'memo_board_data';

  // ── 工具函式 ──
  function esc(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  function toast(msg) {
    var el = document.getElementById('toast');
    el.textContent = msg;
    el.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function () { el.classList.remove('show'); }, 2200);
  }

  function loadAll() {
    try {
      var s = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      return s ? JSON.parse(s) : [];
    } catch (e) {
      return [];
    }
  }

  function saveAll(arr) {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr));
  }

  // ── 渲染列表 ──
  function renderList() {
    var all = loadAll();
    var el = document.getElementById('admin-memo-list');
    var countEl = document.getElementById('memo-count');
    countEl.textContent = '(' + all.length + ' 筆)';
    if (!all.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<div class="admin-empty">尚無 memo，請用上方表單新增。</div>';
      return;
    }
    // 倒序顯示
    var sorted = all.slice().sort(function (a, b) { return (b.date || '').localeCompare(a.date || ''); });
    var html = sorted.map(function (m, i) {
      var origIdx = all.indexOf(m);
      return (
        '<div class="admin-memo-item">' +
          '<div class="admin-memo-top">' +
            '<div>' +
              '<div class="admin-memo-badge">' +
                '<span class="admin-memo-id">' + esc(m.stock_id) + '</span>' +
                '<span class="admin-memo-name">' + esc(m.stock_name) + '</span>' +
              '</div>' +
              '<div class="admin-memo-date">' + esc(m.date) + (m.tags && m.tags.length ? ' · ' + m.tags.map(esc).join(', ') : '') + '</div>' +
              '<div class="admin-memo-title">' + esc(m.title) + '</div>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<button class="admin-btn danger-sm" data-idx="' + origIdx + '">刪除</button>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>'
      );
    });
    el.innerHTML = html.join('');
  }

  // ── 新增 ──
  function getTodayStr() {
    var d = new Date();
    return d.getFullYear() + '-' +
      String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' +
      String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  }

  document.getElementById('f-date').value = getTodayStr();

  document.getElementById('btn-add').addEventListener('click', function () {
    var stockId = document.getElementById('f-stock-id').value.trim();
    var stockName = document.getElementById('f-stock-name').value.trim();
    var date = document.getElementById('f-date').value.trim();
    var title = document.getElementById('f-title').value.trim();
    var content = document.getElementById('f-content').value.trim();
    var tagsRaw = document.getElementById('f-tags').value.trim();

    if (!stockId || !stockName || !date || !title || !content) {
      toast('請填寫：日期、股票代號、股名、標題、內容');
      return;
    }

    var tags = tagsRaw ? tagsRaw.split(/[,，]+/).map(function (t) { return t.trim(); }).filter(Boolean) : [];
    var memo = { date: date, stock_id: stockId, stock_name: stockName, title: title, content: content };
    if (tags.length) memo.tags = tags;

    var all = loadAll();
    all.push(memo);
    saveAll(all);
    renderList();
    toast('✓ 已新增 ' + stockId + ' ' + stockName);

    // 清空部分欄位（保留日期）
    document.getElementById('f-stock-id').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-stock-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-title').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-content').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-tags').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-stock-id').focus();
  });

  document.getElementById('btn-clear-form').addEventListener('click', function () {
    document.getElementById('f-stock-id').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-stock-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-title').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-content').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-tags').value = '';
    document.getElementById('f-date').value = getTodayStr();
  });

  // ── 刪除（事件委派）──
  document.getElementById('admin-memo-list').addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var btn = e.target.closest('[data-idx]');
    if (!btn) return;
    var idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
    var all = loadAll();
    var m = all[idx];
    if (!m) return;
    if (!confirm('確定刪除「' + m.stock_id + ' ' + m.stock_name + ' - ' + m.title + '」？')) return;
    all.splice(idx, 1);
    saveAll(all);
    renderList();
    toast('已刪除');
  });

  // ── 清空全部 ──
  document.getElementById('btn-clear-all').addEventListener('click', function () {
    var all = loadAll();
    if (!all.length) { toast('目前無資料'); return; }
    if (!confirm('確定清空所有 ' + all.length + ' 筆 memo？此操作無法復原。')) return;
    saveAll([]);
    renderList();
    toast('已清空所有 memo');
  });

  // ── 匯出 ──
  document.getElementById('btn-export').addEventListener('click', function () {
    var all = loadAll();
    if (!all.length) { toast('目前無資料可匯出'); return; }
    var blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(all, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'memos.json';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    toast('✓ 已下載 memos.json（' + all.length + ' 筆）');
  });

  // ── 匯入 ──
  document.getElementById('file-import').addEventListener('change', function (e) {
    var file = e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    var reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function (ev) {
      try {
        var imported = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
        if (!Array.isArray(imported)) { toast('格式錯誤：應為 JSON 陣列'); return; }
        var valid = imported.filter(function (m) {
          return m && m.stock_id && m.stock_name && m.date && m.content;
        });
        if (!valid.length) { toast('檔案中無有效資料'); return; }

        // Merge：以 date+stock_id+title 去重
        var existing = loadAll();
        var existingKeys = new Set(existing.map(function (m) {
          return (m.date || '') + '|' + (m.stock_id || '') + '|' + (m.title || '');
        }));
        var added = 0;
        valid.forEach(function (m) {
          var key = (m.date || '') + '|' + (m.stock_id || '') + '|' + (m.title || '');
          if (!existingKeys.has(key)) {
            existing.push(m);
            existingKeys.add(key);
            added++;
          }
        });
        saveAll(existing);
        renderList();
        toast('✓ 匯入完成：新增 ' + added + ' 筆（跳過重複 ' + (valid.length - added) + ' 筆）');
      } catch (err) {
        toast('JSON 解析失敗：' + err.message);
      }
      e.target.value = '';
    };
    reader.readAsText(file, 'utf-8');
  });

  // ── 初始化 ──
  renderList();
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>

```

import re, pathlib

)

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}
{% set page = "memo" %}
{% block title %}個股 Memo 公佈欄 · 族群寶{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<section class="hero sf-hero">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;">
    <div>
      <h1>個股 Memo 公佈欄</h1>
      <p>個人研究筆記 · 按日期倒序 · 支援股號／名稱／關鍵字搜尋</p>
    </div>
    <a href="memo-admin.html" class="memo-admin-link" style="margin-bottom:4px;">+ 管理 Memo</a>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="panel" style="margin-top:24px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-bottom:20px;">
    <div class="memo-search-wrap">
      <svg class="search-icon" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
           stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/>
      </svg>
      <input type="text" id="memo-search" placeholder="搜尋股號、名稱或關鍵字…" autocomplete="off">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="memo-board-list" class="memo-board-list"></div>
  <p id="memo-empty-msg" class="memo-empty-msg" hidden>
    尚無 memo 資料。<a href="memo-admin.html">前往新增</a>
  </p>
</section>

<script>
(function () {
  var FALLBACK = {{ memo_data | tojson }};
  var ALL = [];

  function loadData() {
    try {
      var stored = localStorage.getItem('memo_board_data');
      var local = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
      ALL = (local && local.length) ? local : (FALLBACK || []);
    } catch (e) {
      ALL = FALLBACK || [];
    }
    ALL.forEach(function (m) {
      m._k = [m.stock_id, m.stock_name, (m.tags || []).join(' '), m.title || '', m.content || ''].join(' ').toLowerCase();
    });
    ALL.sort(function (a, b) { return (b.date || '').localeCompare(a.date || ''); });
  }

  var list = document.getElementById('memo-board-list');
  var input = document.getElementById('memo-search');
  var emptyMsg = document.getElementById('memo-empty-msg');
  if (!list || !input) return;

  function esc(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  function render(memos) {
    if (!memos.length) { list.innerHTML = ''; emptyMsg.hidden = false; return; }
    emptyMsg.hidden = true;
    var groups = {}, order = [];
    memos.forEach(function (m) {
      var d = m.date || '未標日期';
      if (!groups[d]) { groups[d] = []; order.push(d); }
      groups[d].push(m);
    });
    var html = [];
    order.forEach(function (d) {
      html.push('<div class="memo-date-group"><div class="memo-date-label">' + esc(d) + '</div><div class="memo-cards">');
      groups[d].forEach(function (m, i) {
        var id = 'mc-' + d.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + i;
        var href = 'company/' + esc(m.stock_id) + '.html';
        html.push(
          '<div class="memo-card" id="' + id + '">' +
            '<div class="memo-card-header">' +
              '<div class="memo-card-stock">' +
                '<a href="' + href + '" class="memo-stock-id">' + esc(m.stock_id) + '</a>' +
                '<span class="memo-stock-name">' + esc(m.stock_name) + '</span>' +
              '</div>' +
              '<button class="memo-toggle-btn" data-body="' + id + '-body" aria-expanded="false">' +
                '<span>展開</span>' +
                '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>' +
              '</button>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div class="memo-card-title">' + esc(m.title) + '</div>' +
            (m.tags && m.tags.length ? '<div class="memo-tags">' + m.tags.map(function (t) { return '<span class="memo-tag">' + esc(t) + '</span>'; }).join('') + '</div>' : '') +
            '<div class="memo-card-body" id="' + id + '-body" hidden>' +
              '<p class="memo-content">' + esc(m.content).replace(/\n/g, '<br>') + '</p>' +
            '</div>' +
          '</div>'
        );
      });
      html.push('</div></div>');
    });
    list.innerHTML = html.join('');
  }

  list.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var btn = e.target.closest('.memo-toggle-btn');
    if (!btn) return;
    var body = document.getElementById(btn.getAttribute('data-body'));
    if (!body) return;
    var open = btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
    body.hidden = open;
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!open));
    btn.querySelector('span').textContent = open ? '展開' : '收合';
    btn.classList.toggle('is-open', !open);
  });

  var debounce;
  input.addEventListener('input', function () {
    clearTimeout(debounce);
    debounce = setTimeout(function () {
      var q = input.value.toLowerCase().trim();
      if (!q) { render(ALL); return; }
      var tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      render(ALL.filter(function (m) { return tokens.every(function (t) { return m._k.includes(t); }); }));
    }, 100);
  });

  loadData();
  render(ALL);
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

_**User (2026-05-02 11:52:10Z)**_

6510精測：
精測法說提到 TPU 對探針卡需求的帶動相當明顯，若不計 TPU，HPC 探針卡市場到 2027 年成長幅度可能只有十多趴，但若加入 TPU，成長幅度有機會提高到三成。Google TPU 產值在 2026 年約 900 億美元，2027 年可能提升至 2,080 億美元，顯示 TPU 供應鏈可能是 NVIDIA 之外，未來兩年成長最快的區塊。不過短線股價反應較弱，主因市場傳出 Google TPU 前段 CP 探針卡可能部分由其他供應商取得，精測未必能拿到全部增量；但公司後段與其他測試相關產能仍供不應求，下半年與 2028 年也仍有擴產計畫，因此長線仍可持續追蹤。

6683雍智科技：
雍智被討論的核心在於 Google TPU 前段 CP 探針卡可能出現供應鏈轉移。TPU 某顆晶片可能有四個探針卡版型，其中三個可能由雍智與國際廠拿下，另一個則由旺矽供應。若以 2028 年約 600 萬顆 TPU、每顆探針卡約 300 套、單套價格約 1,000 萬元台幣估算，雍智在 CP 探針卡營收貢獻理論上可能達到相當大的規模。不過最大問題在 PCB 產能是否足以承接，且公司本身未必會明確回應細節，因此股價會偏向消息與預期驅動。若市場真的上修到 80 至 100 元 EPS，評價空間仍大，但需再確認供應鏈細節與產能瓶頸。

那你幫我主動加入這兩個吧

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}
{% set page = "memo" %}
{% block title %}個股 Memo 公佈欄 · 族群寶{% endblock %}

{% block content %}

<!-- 黑板公佈欄 -->
<div class="chalk-board-wrap">
  <div class="chalk-board">
    <div class="chalk-board-inner">
      <div class="chalk-board-title">個股 Memo</div>
      <div class="chalk-board-sub">研究筆記 · 每日更新</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 日期歷史選單 + 搜尋 -->
<div class="memo-toolbar">
  <div class="memo-date-bar" id="memo-date-bar">
    <!-- JS 動態填入 -->
  </div>
  <div class="memo-search-wrap">
    <svg class="search-icon" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
         stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/>
    </svg>
    <input type="text" id="memo-search" placeholder="搜尋股號、名稱或關鍵字…" autocomplete="off">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Memo 卡片列表 -->
<div id="memo-board-list" class="memo-board-list" style="margin-top:20px;"></div>
<p id="memo-empty-msg" class="memo-empty-msg" hidden>此日期無 memo 資料。</p>

<script>
(function () {
  var FALLBACK = {{ memo_data | tojson }};
  var ALL = [];
  var activeDate = 'all';

  function loadData() {
    try {
      var stored = localStorage.getItem('memo_board_data');
      var local = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
      ALL = (local && local.length) ? local : (FALLBACK || []);
    } catch (e) {
      ALL = FALLBACK || [];
    }
    ALL.forEach(function (m) {
      m._k = [m.stock_id, m.stock_name, (m.tags || []).join(' '), m.title || '', m.content || ''].join(' ').toLowerCase();
    });
    ALL.sort(function (a, b) { return (b.date || '').localeCompare(a.date || ''); });
  }

  // ── 日期選單 ──
  function buildDateBar() {
    var bar = document.getElementById('memo-date-bar');
    if (!bar) return;
    var dates = [];
    ALL.forEach(function (m) { if (m.date && dates.indexOf(m.date) < 0) dates.push(m.date); });
    dates.sort(function (a, b) { return b.localeCompare(a); });

    // 預設選最新日期
    if (activeDate === 'all' && dates.length) activeDate = dates[0];

    var html = '<button class="memo-date-chip' + (activeDate === 'all' ? ' active' : '') + '" data-date="all">全部</button>';
    dates.forEach(function (d) {
      html += '<button class="memo-date-chip' + (activeDate === d ? ' active' : '') + '" data-date="' + d + '">' + d + '</button>';
    });
    bar.innerHTML = html;

    bar.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      var btn = e.target.closest('.memo-date-chip');
      if (!btn) return;
      activeDate = btn.getAttribute('data-date');
      bar.querySelectorAll('.memo-date-chip').forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
      btn.classList.add('active');
      applyFilters();
    });
  }

  // ── 過濾（日期 + 搜尋同時作用）──
  function applyFilters() {
    var q = (document.getElementById('memo-search').value || '').toLowerCase().trim();
    var tokens = q ? q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean) : [];
    var filtered = ALL.filter(function (m) {
      var dateOk = (activeDate === 'all') || (m.date === activeDate);
      var searchOk = !tokens.length || tokens.every(function (t) { return m._k.includes(t); });
      return dateOk && searchOk;
    });
    render(filtered);
  }

  var list = document.getElementById('memo-board-list');
  var emptyMsg = document.getElementById('memo-empty-msg');

  function esc(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  function render(memos) {
    if (!memos.length) { list.innerHTML = ''; emptyMsg.hidden = false; return; }
    emptyMsg.hidden = true;
    var groups = {}, order = [];
    memos.forEach(function (m) {
      var d = m.date || '未標日期';
      if (!groups[d]) { groups[d] = []; order.push(d); }
      groups[d].push(m);
    });
    var html = [];
    order.forEach(function (d) {
      html.push('<div class="memo-date-group"><div class="memo-date-label">' + esc(d) + '</div><div class="memo-cards">');
      groups[d].forEach(function (m, i) {
        var id = 'mc-' + d.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + i;
        var href = 'company/' + esc(m.stock_id) + '.html';
        html.push(
          '<div class="memo-card" id="' + id + '">' +
            '<div class="memo-card-header">' +
              '<div class="memo-card-stock">' +
                '<a href="' + href + '" class="memo-stock-id">' + esc(m.stock_id) + '</a>' +
                '<span class="memo-stock-name">' + esc(m.stock_name) + '</span>' +
              '</div>' +
              '<button class="memo-toggle-btn" data-body="' + id + '-body" aria-expanded="false">' +
                '<span>展開</span>' +
                '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>' +
              '</button>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div class="memo-card-title">' + esc(m.title) + '</div>' +
            (m.tags && m.tags.length ? '<div class="memo-tags">' + m.tags.map(function (t) { return '<span class="memo-tag">' + esc(t) + '</span>'; }).join('') + '</div>' : '') +
            '<div class="memo-card-body" id="' + id + '-body" hidden>' +
              '<p class="memo-content">' + esc(m.content).replace(/\n/g, '<br>') + '</p>' +
            '</div>' +
          '</div>'
        );
      });
      html.push('</div></div>');
    });
    list.innerHTML = html.join('');
  }

  list.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var btn = e.target.closest('.memo-toggle-btn');
    if (!btn) return;
    var body = document.getElementById(btn.getAttribute('data-body'));
    if (!body) return;
    var open = btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
    body.hidden = open;
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!open));
    btn.querySelector('span').textContent = open ? '展開' : '收合';
    btn.classList.toggle('is-open', !open);
  });

  var debounce;
  document.getElementById('memo-search').addEventListener('input', function () {
    clearTimeout(debounce);
    debounce = setTimeout(applyFilters, 100);
  });

  loadData();
  buildDateBar();
  applyFilters();
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}

```
